mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, COALESCE(AVG(pr.rating), 0) AS avg_rating, COUNT(pr.id) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rating1_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rating2_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rating3_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rating4_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rating5_count FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_review pr ON p.id = pr.product_id WHERE p.id = #{productId} GROUP BY p.id, p.name

SELECT oi.id AS order_item_id, o.id AS order_id, oi.product_id, oi.product_name, oi.quantity, oi.price, o.created_time AS order_created_time FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = 3 AND oi.id NOT IN (SELECT order_item_id FROM product_review WHERE user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY o.created_time DESC
